change_password_by_recovery_code.es: Estás cambiando la contraseña usando el código de recuperación, si no has solicitado un cambio de contraseña o no has generado un código de recuperación recientemente, es recomendable que cambies tu contraseña para proteger tu cuenta.
change_password_by_recovery_code.en: You are changing the password using the recovery code, if you have not requested a password change or have not recently generated a recovery code, it is recommended that you change your password to protect your account.

the_user_failed_to_log_in.en: The user failed to log in

the_username_or_password_is_incorrect.es: El usuario o la contraseña es incorrecta
the_username_or_password_is_incorrect.en: The username or password is incorrect

confirm_delete_account.es: ¿Estás seguro de que deseas eliminar tu cuenta?
confirm_delete_account.en: Are you sure you want to delete your account?

delete_account_warning.es: Eliminar tu cuenta es irreversible, se eliminarán todos tus datos y no podrás recuperarlos, ¿estás seguro de que deseas eliminar tu cuenta?
delete_account_warning.en: Deleting your account is irreversible, all your data will be deleted and you will not be able to recover it, are you sure you want to delete your account?

recovery_code_description.es: El código de recuperación es un pin que te permite recuperar tu cuenta en caso de olvidar tu contraseña, es recomendable cambiar la contraseña si olvidaste el código de recuperación.
recovery_code_description.en: The recovery code is a pin that allows you to recover your account in case you forget your password, it is recommended to change the password if you forgot the recovery code.

fill_the_fields_with_the_requested_data.es: Llene los campos con los datos solicitados
fill_the_fields_with_the_requested_data.en: Fill the fields with the requested data

recovery_pin_generated.es: Se ha generado un nuevo pin de recuperación para tu cuenta:
recovery_pin_generated.en: A new recovery pin has been generated for your account:

it_is_recommended_to_change_the_password.es: Es recomendable cambiar la contraseña si la olvidaste
it_is_recommended_to_change_the_password.en: It is recommended to change the password if forgotten

do_you_want_to_change_the_password.en: Do you want to change the password?

the_user_was_not_updated_successfully.en: The user was not updated successfully

the_user_was_not_created_successfully.en: The user was not created successfully

the_user_to_modify_does_not_exist.es: El usuario a modificar no existe
the_user_to_modify_does_not_exist.en: The user to modify does not exist

join_community_message.es: Únete a Switch hoy y organiza tu vida digital.
join_community_message.en: Join Switch today and organize your digital life.

community_description.es: Conéctate con otros usuarios, comparte tus logros y descubre nuevas recomendaciones.
community_description.en: Connect with other users, share your achievements and discover new recommendations.

diary_description.es: Escribe tu diario personal y reflexiona sobre tus experiencias diarias.
diary_description.en: Write your personal diary and reflect on your daily experiences.

notes_description.es: Crea y organiza notas rápidas para capturar tus ideas en cualquier momento.
notes_description.en: Create and organize quick notes to capture your ideas anytime.

goals_description.es: Establece y cumple tus objetivos personales, mantén el seguimiento del progreso.
goals_description.en: Set and achieve your personal goals, keep track of your progress.

birthday_description.es: Guarda y recuerda los cumpleaños de personas importantes en tu vida.
birthday_description.en: Save and remember the birthdays of important people in your life.

anipelis_description.es: Lleva el control de todos tus animes favoritos, califica episodios y guarda tus series preferidas.
anipelis_description.en: Keep track of all your favorite animes, rate episodes and save your favorite series.

organize_manage.es: Organiza y gestiona tus animes, metas, notas y más
organize_manage.en: Organize and manage your animes, goals, notes and more

join_community.es: Únete a nuestra comunidad y gestiona tus animes, metas, notas y más
join_community.en: Join our community and manage your animes, goals, notes and more

diary_today_note.es: Hay una nota para hoy, puedes buscarla y editarla o agregar otra nota con otra fecha
diary_today_note.en: There's a note for today, you can search for it and edit it or add another note with a different date

diary_note_exists.es: Ya tienes una nota para esta fecha
diary_note_exists.en: You already have a note for this date

no_access.es: No tiene acceso a esta página.
no_access.en: You don't have access to this page.

fill_required.es: Por favor llene los datos obligatorios.

fail.es: Ocurrió un error al guardar los datos.
fail.en: An error occurred while saving the data.

confirm_delete.en: Are you sure you want to delete?

profile_not_found_searched.es: No se encontró el perfil buscado
profile_not_found_searched.en: The searched profile was not found

page_not_found.es: No se encuentra la página solicitada
page_not_found.en: The requested page is not found

external_disclaimer.es: No me hago responsable por el contenido externo del enlace
external_disclaimer.en: I am not responsible for the external link content
